nodes.description: PCTRM Round 0 substrate consistency bundle. Tests whether the RUM vocabulary (soliton, modulus, remainder, channel, interface/implementation) reproduces validated cross-domain identities from integer and transcendental arithmetic: cosmological partition (pi/12, 13/264, (251-22pi)/264), DM/baryon ratio (22pi/13), H0 transit ratio (12/11), Koide lepton closure (2/3), CKM integer channels (9/40, 1/24), gap ratio (38/27), proton lattice factor (3pi/2), microscopic-cosmic bridge, plus structural substrate identities (beta = pi/4, L1 circumference = 8, generation democracy = 4/3, cosmic flatness, photon budget).
nodes.notes: All inputs exist in pool. No new values created. Round 0 baseline sweep covering Level 1 (subatomic), Level 2 (atomic), Level 3 (nuclear lattice), Level 5 (gravity structural), Level 6 (cosmological) predictions simultaneously.
